summary: First test run of The Beat 515 MVP - All backend APIs and frontend flows tested successfully. Backend: 19/19 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All critical user flows working correctly.

issues: Console warning: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use 'boxShadow' instead
Console warning: [Layout children]: No route named 'admin' exists - route is 'admin/index'

action_items: Optional: Update shadow props to use boxShadow syntax to remove deprecation warnings
Optional: Fix admin route reference in _layout.tsx to use 'admin/index' instead of 'admin'
seed_data_creation: No additional seed data created. Used existing seeded data: admin, DJ, editor users, 4 news articles, 2 shows, now playing info
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly. Backend APIs returning proper data with MongoDB _id excluded. Frontend UI rendering correctly with proper branding, navigation, and all interactive features functional. Auth flow (login, registration, logout) working. Role-based access control working (admin dashboard only accessible to admin users). Song requests, news articles, shows all displaying and functioning correctly.

backend_tests_passed: Now playing endpoint (Blinding Lights by The Weeknd)
Stream config (The Beat 515 - Proud. Loud. Local.)
frontend_flows_tested: Login page loads with THE BEAT 515 branding and tagline
Admin login flow with redirect to /home
Home screen displays LIVE badge, Now Playing section, shows, and news
News tab navigation and article list display
Requests tab with song request form (Request/Live Chat tabs)
Song request submission and display in recent requests
Profile tab showing user info and role badge
Admin dashboard access from profile (shows stats: users, articles, requests, shows)
Registration flow creating new listener account
